name: protein-lab
description: Dry-lab task intake, experiment planning, local rounds, tools, collaboration, reporting, and guardrails for Protein Lab.

interface.longDescription: Protein Lab helps Codex triage life-science dry-lab tasks, plan experiments, manage local rounds, run tool-specific workflows, work with collaboration platforms, interpret raw evidence, write Chinese reports, and capture project-specific guardrails. AlphaFold Server is the first tool skill and Feishu is the first collaboration platform skill.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me triage and run a Protein Lab dry-lab task.
